reference_module.title: Tools, Function Calling and Structured Outputs

checklist.entry: Use built-in tools only when the product need and data-governance model justify them.
Declare tool availability, tool inputs, tool outputs and failure handling explicitly.
For external systems, use function calling or supported tool mechanisms rather than asking the model to fabricate side effects.
Treat function-call arguments as untrusted model output until schema validation and application validation pass.
Do not execute destructive, payment, messaging, account-setting or irreversible tool calls without explicit human-controlled confirmation.
Record idempotency, retry and partial-failure behaviour for tool calls.
Use Structured Outputs where downstream code needs predictable JSON shape.
Validate output against the declared JSON schema before using it.
Design refusal, incomplete output and validation-failure paths.
Do not treat schema conformance as truth, safety or correctness.
